sections.location: There are smoke detectors in each of the bedrooms as well as the hallways.
The water heater is located in the closet to the left of the stairs.
The circuit breaker is located at the top of the stairs near the attic.
The water shut off is located at the end of the driveway.
The HVAC system is located at the top of the stairs.
The electric meter is located on the exterior of the house.
The thermostats are located upstairs and downstairs near the stairway.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
